about: Ask a question about the project

labels: question

## ❓ Question

<!-- Ask your question clearly and concisely -->

## 🔍 What I've Tried

<!-- Describe what you've already tried to find the answer -->

- [ ] Searched existing issues
- [ ] Read the documentation
- [ ] Checked Discord/community
- [ ] Googled the problem
- [ ] Asked in Discord #help channel

## 📚 Context

<!-- Provide context that might help answer your question -->

**Related to:**
- [ ] Setup/Installation
- [ ] Frontend development
- [ ] Backend development
- [ ] Deployment
- [ ] Contributing
- [ ] Using the application
- [ ] Other: _______________

## 🖥️ Environment (if relevant)

- **OS:** [e.g., Windows, macOS, Linux]
- **Version:** [e.g., Node 18, Python 3.10]

## 💬 Preferred Answer Format

- [ ] Step-by-step guide
- [ ] Code example
- [ ] Link to documentation
- [ ] Explanation
- [ ] Video/Screenshot

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for similar questions
- [ ] I have provided sufficient context
- [ ] This is not a bug report (use bug template instead)
- [ ] This is not a feature request (use feature template instead)

---

**Note:** For general questions, consider asking in Discord #help channel for faster responses!
